Let me list them out: - Betty saw him reading at the library from 9am to 2pm. - David saw him fixing a computer at the electronic store from 2pm to 4pm. - Mary saw him taking photos near the Eiffel Tower from 4pm to 5pm. - Hannah saw him sitting on a rooftop from 5pm to 6pm. - Susan saw him driving to the water park from 6pm to 7pm. Also, the bakery was closed after 7pm, so he had to go before that. Now, the key here is to figure out when Richard was unaccounted for. Since each of these people saw him doing something specific during their respective time frames, those times are when he was definitely not at the bakery. But there's no mention of what he did between 8am and 9am. That's a possible window. 2. 9am to 2pm: At the library with Betty. So during this time, he's occupied, so he can't go to the bakery then.
